# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULES = (Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") ?? "")
  .split(",")
  .map((s) => s.trim())
  .filter(Boolean);

type PluginContext = {
  request: Request;
  url: URL;
  state: Record<string, unknown>;
};

type PluginResult =
  | Response
  | {
      status?: number;
      headers?: HeadersInit;
      body?: BodyInit | null;
      state?: Record<string, unknown>;
    }
  | void;

type PluginModule =
  | {
      default?: (ctx: PluginContext) => PluginResult | Promise<PluginResult>;
      handle?: (ctx: PluginContext) => PluginResult | Promise<PluginResult>;
      setup?: (ctx: PluginContext) => PluginResult | Promise<PluginResult>;
    }
  | ((ctx: PluginContext) => PluginResult | Promise<PluginResult>);

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) {
    headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  }
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    ...init,
    headers,
  });
}

function getRequestedModules(url: URL): string[] {
  const queryModules = [
    ...url.searchParams.getAll("module"),
    ...url.searchParams.getAll("modules").flatMap((v) => v.split(",")),
  ]
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

  return [...new Set([...DEFAULT_MODULES, ...queryModules])];
}

function isAllowedSpecifier(specifier: string): boolean {
  try {
    const url = new URL(specifier);
    return url.protocol === "https:" || url.protocol === "http:";
  } catch {
    return specifier.startsWith("./") || specifier.startsWith("../") || specifier.startsWith("/");
  }
}

async function loadPlugin(specifier: string): Promise<PluginModule> {
  if (!isAllowedSpecifier(specifier)) {
    throw new Error(`Disallowed module specifier: ${specifier}`);
  }
  return await import(specifier);
}

async function runPlugin(
  plugin: PluginModule,
  ctx: PluginContext,
): Promise<PluginResult> {
  if (typeof plugin === "function") {
    return await plugin(ctx);
  }
  if (typeof plugin.default === "function") {
    return await plugin.default(ctx);
  }
  if (typeof plugin.handle === "function") {
    return await plugin.handle(ctx);
  }
  if (typeof plugin.setup === "function") {
    return await plugin.setup(ctx);
  }
  return;
}

function normalizeResult(result: PluginResult, ctx: PluginContext): Response | null {
  if (result instanceof Response) return result;
  if (!result) return null;

  if (result.state && typeof result.state === "object") {
    Object.assign(ctx.state, result.state);
  }

  if ("body" in result || "status" in result || "headers" in result) {
    return new Response(result.body ?? null, {
      status: result.status ?? 200,
      headers: result.headers,
    });
  }

  return null;
}

Deno.serve(async (request) => {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const modules = getRequestedModules(url);
  const ctx: PluginContext = {
    request,
    url,
    state: {},
  };

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return json({ ok: true });
  }

  const loaded: string[] = [];
  const errors: Array<{ module: string; error: string }> = [];

  for (const specifier of modules) {
    try {
      const plugin = await loadPlugin(specifier);
      loaded.push(specifier);
      const result = await runPlugin(plugin, ctx);
      const response = normalizeResult(result, ctx);
      if (response) return response;
    } catch (error) {
      errors.push({
        module: specifier,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      });
    }
  }

  return json({
    ok: errors.length === 0,
    message: "Deno Deploy plugin loader",
    request: {
      method: request.method,
      pathname: url.pathname,
    },
    loadedModules: loaded,
    requestedModules: modules,
    errors,
    state: ctx.state,
  }, {
    status: errors.length ? 500 : 200,
  });
});
